tasks.name: Fix grey text on new category label

comments.text: Simple Budgets issue: After adding a new category and typing in the name, the text renders in grey instead of the normal color. Looks like placeholder styling isn't being cleared — the label should switch to the active text color once the name is saved or confirmed.

tasks.name: Improve bill payment manual status & sorting

comments.text:
Two related improvements for the manual bill payment flow in Simple Budgets:

1. Better design for manually changing bill payment status — the current UI for toggling a bill's paid/unpaid status needs a UX refresh. Should be more obvious and satisfying to mark a bill as paid.

2. Organize manual pay by due date — bills in the manual pay section should be sorted by due date so the most urgent ones appear first. Currently no clear sort order.

Simple Budgets issue: The mobile app frequently appears slightly zoomed in, making the layout feel off. Could be a viewport meta tag issue, an unintentional CSS transform, or a scaling quirk on certain devices. Check viewport settings and whether any elements cause horizontal overflow triggering auto-zoom.

tasks.name: Fix transaction amount not updating in view

comments.text: Simple Budgets issue: When editing a transaction amount (reported with Barclay's specifically), the new value saves correctly to the underlying data but the UI doesn't refresh to reflect the change. The save works — it's a state/reactivity bug where the frontend isn't re-rendering after the update completes.
